observed_failure.prior_local_claim: SkillGuard supervises exact installation projections for maintained target skills
observed_failure.observed_result: SkillGuard could calculate and compare a single-skill projection but its only mutation route hard-coded the SkillGuard plus global-router self-install cohort, self smoke commands, shared HEAD, and two-member recovery chain

generalized_repair.rule: A maintained single skill receives an isolated per-target transaction chain that copies only projection:installation and never executes arbitrary target commands; SkillGuard self-install remains a distinct cohort.
generalized_repair.openspec_scenario: First install, replacement, rollback, recovery, source-only exclusion, and self-HEAD isolation all fail closed.
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: The target installer does not reuse the self-installer with flags, share its HEAD, auto-run native checks, copy an entire repository, or accept a non-current contract.

required_revalidation: Storyline target installation and installed parity replay
one portfolio-level final full validation after all governed sources freeze

revalidation_evidence.target_installation_tests: 10 cases: 9 passed and one explicit Windows directory-symlink permission skip
revalidation_evidence.compiler_and_target_installation_tests: 57 cases: 56 passed and the same one explicit skip
revalidation_evidence.storyline_installed_native_and_parity: positive route, unknown-artifact negative, and 6/6 parity cases passed

claim_boundary: The planned repair covers local single-skill staging and activation safety. It does not prove target semantics, release publication, the final full parent, or future AI behavior.
